name: Sour Cream & Dill Drop Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt and sugar.
2. Add the dill and the shortening; blend until it resembles meal.
3. Stir in sour cream and milk; stir until it just forms a soft sticky dough.
4. Drop by rounded tablespoons onto a buttered baking sheet.
5. Bake in the middle of a preheated 425°F oven for 15 to 17 minutes, or until pale golden.
6. Makes about 16 biscuits.
